title: swida poliophylla var. praelonga
intro: Swida poliophylla var. praelonga, also known as a variety of the Swida poliophylla or the Swamp Alder, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to the mountainous regions of Japan. The medicinal properties of Swida poliophylla var. praelonga are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Swida poliophylla var. praelonga is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
